title: 1: Code Maintainability

annotations.description: Evaluates whether the solution correctly removes vizAndWidgetSplit feature toggle code, widget-specific props, widget UI elements, and related conditional logic.
annotations.evidence: N/A: No Evidence Required
annotations.justification: N/A: No Justification Required

title: 1.1: Removes the vizAndWidgetSplit property from the FeatureToggles TypeScript interface

annotations.description: Verifies that the vizAndWidgetSplit optional boolean field is removed from the FeatureToggles interface in packages/grafana-data/src/types/featureToggles.gen.ts.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 13-24 show removal of 'vizAndWidgetSplit?: boolean' from the FeatureToggles interface in featureToggles.gen.ts.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states the feature toggle is registered in 'the frontend TypeScript feature toggles interface' and to 'clean up all of these definitions.' [3: Logical Necessity] Removing the feature requires removing its type definition to prevent stale types. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove the vizAndWidgetSplit property from the FeatureToggles interface.

title: 1.2: Removes the LS_WIDGET_SELECT_TAB_KEY constant from public/app/core/constants.ts

annotations.description: Verifies that the widget-specific local storage key constant (LS_WIDGET_SELECT_TAB_KEY) is removed from public/app/core/constants.ts.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 118-127 show removal of 'export const LS_WIDGET_SELECT_TAB_KEY' from constants.ts.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'any tab options, enum values, or constants that only exist to support the widget distinction should also be removed.' [3: Logical Necessity] With widget tab functionality removed, this constant serves no purpose. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove this widget tab constant.

title: 1.3: Removes the Widgets value from the VisualizationSelectPaneTab enum

annotations.description: Verifies that the Widgets member is removed from the VisualizationSelectPaneTab enum in public/app/features/dashboard/components/PanelEditor/types.ts, leaving only Visualizations, LibraryPanels, and Suggestions.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 278-286 show removal of 'Widgets,' from the VisualizationSelectPaneTab enum in types.ts.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'any tab options, enum values, or constants that only exist to support the widget distinction should also be removed.' [6: Interface Requirement] The interface specifies VisualizationSelectPaneTab contains only Visualizations, LibraryPanels, and Suggestions members. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove the Widgets value from the enum.

title: 1.4: Removes both widget-specific items (isWidget prop, vizAndWidgetSplit conditional logic) from PanelTypeFilter in PanelTypeFilter.tsx

annotations.description: Verifies that PanelTypeFilter no longer conditionally switches between widget and visualization plugin lists. The component should always provide all panel plugins without any widget/visualization distinction.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 84-114 show removal of isWidget prop, getVizPluginMeta/getWidgetPluginMeta conditional logic, and config.featureToggles.vizAndWidgetSplit check in PanelTypeFilter.tsx.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'components that branch behavior based on whether something is a widget or a visualization should be simplified to always treat everything as a panel.' [6: Interface Requirement] The interface specifies PanelTypeFilter takes only onChange and maxMenuHeight props (no isWidget). [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must simplify PanelTypeFilter to always show all panel plugins.

title: 1.5: Removes both widget-specific items (isWidget prop, vizAndWidgetSplit conditional logic) from VizTypePicker in VizTypePicker.tsx

annotations.description: Verifies that VizTypePicker no longer conditionally switches between widget and visualization plugin lists. The component should always provide all panel plugins without any widget/visualization distinction.

annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'components that branch behavior based on whether something is a widget or a visualization should be simplified to always treat everything as a panel.' [6: Interface Requirement] The interface specifies VizTypePicker takes pluginId, searchQuery, onChange, and trackSearch props (no isWidget). [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must simplify VizTypePicker to always show all panel plugins.

title: 1.8: Removes the widget menu item from the add panel menu

annotations.description: Verifies that the conditionally rendered Widget menu item is removed from the dashboard add panel menu in public/app/features/dashboard/components/AddPanelButton/AddPanelMenu.tsx.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 163-191 show removal of the Menu.Item with key='add-widget' and label 'Widget' from AddPanelMenu.tsx.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'the dashboard UI presented widgets as a separate category from visualizations, with dedicated menu items... Remove all of this widget-specific conditional UI.' [3: Logical Necessity] With the feature abandoned, the Widget menu item should not exist. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove the widget menu item.

title: 1.12: Removes the Widgets tab from PanelVizTypePicker

title: 1.13: Removes widget filtering logic from library panel search

annotations.description: Verifies that the widget-specific filtering function and its conditional invocation are removed from searchForLibraryPanels in public/app/features/library-panels/components/LibraryPanelsView/actions.ts. The search should return all library panels without filtering by skipDataQuery.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 381-437 show removal of isWidget from SearchArgs, the filterLibraryPanels function, and the conditional filtering block in actions.ts.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'the library panels search conditionally filters panels based on the feature flag. This filtering should be removed so the search returns all library panels regardless of type.' [6: Interface Requirement] The interface specifies SearchArgs no longer includes an isWidget field. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove the widget filtering logic from the library panel search.

title: 1.14: Removes the vizAndWidgetSplit guard from the panel suggestions logic

annotations.description: Verifies that the vizAndWidgetSplit check is removed from the suggestions condition in public/app/features/panel/state/getAllSuggestions.ts, so widget-type panel suggestions always appear when there is no field data.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch lines 510-522 show the condition changed from 'if (!config.featureToggles.vizAndWidgetSplit && builder.dataSummary.fieldCount === 0)' to 'if (builder.dataSummary.fieldCount === 0)' in getAllSuggestions.ts.
annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'the panel suggestions logic has a feature flag guard that should be removed so suggestions always appear when there is no field data.' [3: Logical Necessity] With the feature toggle removed, the guard condition referencing it should be simplified. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must remove the vizAndWidgetSplit guard from getAllSuggestions.

title: 4.1: Removes any of the 3 preserved VisualizationSelectPaneTab enum values (Visualizations, Suggestions, LibraryPanels) from types.ts

annotations.description: Checks that the solution only removes the Widgets enum value and does not accidentally remove the Visualizations, Suggestions, or LibraryPanels enum values which must remain.
annotations.evidence: gold.patch preserves Visualizations, Suggestions, and LibraryPanels enum values in types.ts while only removing the Widgets value.
annotations.justification: [2: Implicit Codebase Constraint] The codebase has both visualization and widget enum values; only widget-specific ones should be removed. [3: Logical Necessity] The prompt asks to remove widget-specific code, not visualization code. Removing these enum values would break the panel editor tabs. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, the 3 non-widget enum values must be preserved.
